results.title: Aston Villa sign Swiss World Cup star Manzambi
results.description: Aston Villa announced the signing of Switzerland World Cup star Johan Manzambi from German side Freiburg on Friday for a reported club record fee of just over £50 million ($67 million)."I hope I can play the same as in the World Cup and with Freiburg."

results.title: 'It Only Takes Seconds': Family speaks after Kern River drowning
results.description: As triple-digit temperatures draw more people to the water, officials and a grieving family warn the Kern River can become deadly in seconds.

results.title: Ontario severe storm risk Saturday carries uncertainty
results.description: Beware a risk for severe thunderstorms throughout southern Ontario into your day on Saturday

results.title: Report: Coachella Valley Lakers head coach Zach Guthrie promoted to NBA side
results.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (KESQ) - The head coach of the Coachella Valley Lakers has been moved to the NBA side, leaving their G-League affiliate without a head coach ahead of its debut season in the desert later this year. Zach Guthrie, coach of the then South Bay Lakers, is now a Lakers assistant coach and The post Report: Coachella Valley Lakers head coach Zach Guthrie promoted to NBA side appeared first on KESQ .

results.title: AFN calls on provinces, Ottawa to protect treaty rights ahead of Alberta referendum
results.description: The Assembly of First Nations has passed an emergency resolution stating no province has the legal authority to change or eliminate treaty rights. It comes ahead of a fall referendum in Alberta on whether the province should stay in Canada. Emma Zhao.

results.title: A 3am final, a Monday shift — and one invitation that could save both
results.description: Hong Kong football fans planning to stay up for Monday’s World Cup final face a familiar dilemma: miss the biggest match of the tournament, or turn up for work several hours later looking as though they have played all 120 minutes themselves.

results.title: England train in Miami ahead of World Cup 2026 third-place match against France
results.description: England's football team trains in Miami ahead of their FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place match against France after a semi-final loss to Argentina.
